examples: Current thinking is that women distribute the fat below the waist because it's a fat storage depot for pregnancy and lactation.
Harbor seals are small compared with other phocids species such as grey seals, all of which are known to fast for the entire lactation period.
Since such a large proportion of their fat stores is exhausted despite feeding, mother seals clearly cannot support all of lactation using only energy stored before giving birth.
The women I interviewed took classes, read books, practiced with dolls, and met with lactation experts.
At Wolynn's practice, all six of the pediatricians on staff are also certified lactation consultants.
